recommendations.title: Kidnapping Mr. Heineken
recommendations.overview: The true story of the kidnapping of Freddy Heineken, the grandson of the founder of the Heineken brewery, and his driver. They were released after a ransom of 35 million Dutch guilders was paid.

recommendations.title: Blackway

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
recommendations.overview: Swedish thriller based on Stieg Larsson's novel about a male journalist and a young female hacker. In the opening of the movie, Mikael Blomkvist, a middle-aged publisher for the magazine Millennium, loses a libel case brought by corrupt Swedish indus

recommendations.title: Anatomy of a Fall
recommendations.overview: A woman is suspected of her husband's murder, and their blind son faces a moral dilemma as the sole witness.

recommendations.title: In the Heat of the Night
recommendations.overview: African-American Philadelphia police detective Virgil Tibbs is arrested on suspicion of murder by Bill Gillespie, the racist police chief of tiny Sparta, Mississippi. After Tibbs proves not only his own innocence but that of another man, he joins for

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Reptile
recommendations.overview: Following the brutal murder of a young real estate agent, a hardened detective attempts to uncover the truth in a case where nothing is as it seems, and by doing so dismantles the illusions in his own life.

recommendations.title: Mercy
recommendations.overview: In the near future, a detective stands on trial accused of murdering his wife. He has ninety minutes to prove his innocence to the advanced AI Judge he once championed, before it determines his fate.
